title: Structural Rewrite Phase 4 Closeout Coordination Sync Reuse Migration
subject: planning.structural_rewrite_program
summary: Records the completed bounded Phase 4 closeout coordination sync-reuse slice by routing InitiativeCloseoutService through CoordinationSyncService for the five approved shared outputs after the traceability write while preserving the explicit closeout result contract.
notes: This transition preserves traceability as the pre-seam canonical write, limits the reused seam to initiative-index, planning-catalog, coordination-index, initiative-tracking, and coordination-tracking, keeps PRD, decision, and design tracking direct and explicit, and stops at a dedicated outcome-review task before any later bounded checkpoint opens.
